token.description: Todoist personal API token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <token>). Never logged. Takes precedence over bearer_token when both are configured.

bearer_token.description: Fallback Todoist personal API token, used only when token is not configured. Sent as a Bearer token. Never logged.

base_url.description: Todoist REST API base URL override for tests or proxies.

project_id.description: Optional Todoist project id used to scope the 'comments' stream to a single project.

task_id.description: Optional Todoist task id used to scope the 'comments' stream to a single task.
